log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Firbolg — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 31 damage. Firbolg — Winged Striker HP: 36/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Firbolg — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Firbolg — Winged Striker HP: 23/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!

→ Rock: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Firbolg — Winged Striker HP: -4/67
